name: Grasshopper Cheese Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Cream cheese at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
CHOCOLATE COOKIE CRUMB CRUST: Combine the chocolate cookie crumbs with melted butter and cinnamon. Toss and mix well. Press into the bottom and partially up the sides of the springform pan. Refrigerate while making the filling.
CHEESE FILLING: Put the cream cheese in a mixing bowl and beat until light and soft. Add 3/4 cup of sugar and mix well. Stir in the crème de menthe, crème de cacao, flour, and salt. Beat until the mixture is blended well. Add the egg yolks and sour cream, and beat until the batter is smooth and blended. Combine the egg whites with 1/4 cup remaining sugar and beat until the whites form soft peaks. Fold the beaten whites into the cream-cheese mixture. Pour the batter into the crust and bake at 325°F for about 1 hour, or until the cake has puffed and trembles just slightly when shaken. A wooden skewer inserted in the cake should come out almost clean, with just a trace of batter or moist crumbs on it. Do not overbake; it will settle and firm somewhat as it cools. Do not worry if the cake cracks as it bakes. Remove from oven and cool. Refrigerate if standing more than 4 hours. Garnish the top with grated chocolate.
